# Sensitivity sweeps — UNVERIFIED / CONDITIONAL constants (auto-generated)

*Generated by scripts/summarize_sensitivity.py; evidence of record in docs/autofit/inventory/sensitivity_sweeps.jsonl. One-factor-at-a-time around the engine defaults on the real region anchors; every run is IC at gate options.*

**Verdict rule:** a constant is 'insensitive on the labeled anchors' when winner AND conditional status match the default run at every swept value. Insensitivity here is evidence for keeping defaults, NOT literature verification — flags stay until a cited basis exists (spec §9).
